title: JuanSMP
description: JuanSMP is an upcoming series where a group of friends try to play Minecraft on a modded server.
body:
# A modpack a group of friends use to play on a modded server with eachother.

⚠️ This is the official JuanSMP modpack link. All other links claiming to be/contain JuanSMP are fake. Do not trust them.

All credits go to the creators of the respective mods added in this modpack.

Special thanks to [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) for LoD generation.
